examples.title: Algorithm: Geth Client
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating the basic functionality of a Geth client
examples.code:
ALGORITHM GethClient
INPUT: network ID, gas price, gas limit
OUTPUT: Ethereum client instance

BEGIN
 1. Initialize Ethereum client with network ID
 2. Set gas price and gas limit
 3. Establish connection to Ethereum network
 4. Return Ethereum client instance
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps involved in creating a Geth client instance.

examples.title: Python: Geth Client
examples.description: Python implementation of a basic Geth client
examples.code:
import json
import requests

class GethClient:
 def __init__(self, network_id, gas_price, gas_limit):
 self.network_id = network_id
 self.gas_price = gas_price
 self.gas_limit = gas_limit
 self.url = 'https://mainnet.infura.io/v3/YOUR_PROJECT_ID'

 def send_transaction(self, from_address, to_address, value):

 pass

 def get_account_balance(self, address):
